violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Handle of scoops touching pizza topping in prep table.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Cappucino machine has build up inside door in need of cleaning.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. -Employee was observed washing pizza pans not using the rinse step for a 3 sink system.
Single-service and single-use articles. — --Single-service item was not stored in a proper location to be protected from contamination. -Single use items stored in back room on floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Ceiling tile over bread oven needs cleaning. -Air vents over sandwich station in need of cleaning -Floors under/behind pizza over and prep tables need cleaning
Storage and handling of maintenance items. — --Wet-use maintenance items, such as mops, were not placed in a position that allows proper air-drying. -Mops unable to hang and dry properly.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, knowledgeable, certified manager (4 pts deducted)
